summary: This Excel file contains product monitoring data and detailed conversation logs from AI phone agents. It includes performance metrics, patient PII (names, DOBs, phone numbers), and full transcripts of interactions with both patients and GP partners. The logs reveal the specific scripts and sales pitches used by the AI system.
